violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Ice Machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was placed out of order. Ice machine was turned off. Service call placed by establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026
The tile floor by the three bay is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2026
The floor tile in the bar area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2025
